task: Optimize a device-specific encoding ladder under CDN budget using only the provided embedded packet. Produce codec_ladder_optimization.xlsx and streaming_policy.md containing executable formulas/logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity analysis (using sensitivity_shift_pct), and a final recommendation table. Separate safety/compliance blockers (which override ROI) from economic optimizations; rank non-blockers by expected value per unit cost. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Run the specified sensitivity check, apply hard_threshold_record_count and decision_budget_usd constraints, and recommend hold/release/retest/mitigation per record.
